'''bokataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eosinophillic|eosinophillic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eosinophillic|eosinophillic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bokataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokatithi|bokatithi]] || [[word:bokatiji|bokatiji]] || [[word:bokatishi|bokatishi]] || [[word:bokatiki|bokatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokatuthuthu|bokatuthuthu]] || [[word:bokatujuju|bokatujuju]] || [[word:bokatushushu|bokatushushu]] || [[word:bokatukuku|bokatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokatuthu|bokatuthu]] || [[word:bokatuju|bokatuju]] || [[word:bokatushu|bokatushu]] || [[word:bokatuku|bokatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokatufthuf|bokatufthuf]] || [[word:bokatufjuf|bokatufjuf]] || [[word:bokatufshuf|bokatufshuf]] || [[word:bokatufkuf|bokatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokatethe|bokatethe]] || [[word:bokateje|bokateje]] || [[word:bokateshe|bokateshe]] || [[word:bokateke|bokateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokatothotho|bokatothotho]] || [[word:bokatojojo|bokatojojo]] || [[word:bokatoshosho|bokatoshosho]] || [[word:bokatokoko|bokatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokatotho|bokatotho]] || [[word:bokatojo|bokatojo]] || [[word:bokatosho|bokatosho]] || [[word:bokatoko|bokatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokatofthof|bokatofthof]] || [[word:bokatofjof|bokatofjof]] || [[word:bokatofshof|bokatofshof]] || [[word:bokatofkof|bokatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfthÃŸf|bokatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfjÃŸf|bokatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfshÃŸf|bokatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfkÃŸf|bokatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bokatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bokatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bokatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bokatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfthÃŸf|bokatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfjÃŸf|bokatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfshÃŸf|bokatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfkÃŸf|bokatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfthÃŸf|bokatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfjÃŸf|bokatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfshÃŸf|bokatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bokatÃŸfkÃŸf|bokatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bokatÃḊthÃḊ|bokatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bokatÃḊjÃḊ|bokatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bokatÃḊshÃḊ|bokatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bokatÃḊkÃḊ|bokatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bokatathatha|bokatathatha]] || [[word:bokatajaja|bokatajaja]] || [[word:bokatashasha|bokatashasha]] || [[word:bokatakaka|bokatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bokatatha|bokatatha]] || [[word:bokataja|bokataja]] || [[word:bokatasha|bokatasha]] || [[word:bokataka|bokataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bokatafthaf|bokatafthaf]] || [[word:bokatafjaf|bokatafjaf]] || [[word:bokatafshaf|bokatafshaf]] || [[word:bokatafkaf|bokatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bokatasha|bokatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokatshÃḋsha|bokatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokatrosha|bokatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokatmusha|bokatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokatyasha|bokatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokatnkshÃḋsha|gobokatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokatnkrosha|gobokatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokatnkmusha|gobokatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokatnkyasha|gobokatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bokakatasha|bokakatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokakatshÃḋsha|bokakatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokakatrosha|bokakatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokakatmusha|bokakatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokakatyasha|bokakatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokakatnkshÃḋsha|gobokakatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokakatnkrosha|gobokakatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokakatnkmusha|gobokakatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokakatnkyasha|gobokakatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bekÃḊtasha|bekÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bekÃḊtshÃḋsha|bekÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bekÃḊtrosha|bekÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bekÃḊtmusha|bekÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bekÃḊtyasha|bekÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobekÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gobekÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobekÃḊtnkrosha|gobekÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobekÃḊtnkmusha|gobekÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobekÃḊtnkyasha|gobekÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bokfatasha|bokfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bokfatshÃḋsha|bokfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bokfatrosha|bokfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bokfatmusha|bokfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bokfatyasha|bokfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobokfatnkshÃḋsha|gobokfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobokfatnkrosha|gobokfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobokfatnkmusha|gobokfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobokfatnkyasha|gobokfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
